title: hieracium triviale
intro: Hieracium triviale, also known as small hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium triviale include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
